name: OpenAI
interviewFormat: Multiple rounds: technical screens (ML + systems), research presentations for research roles, systems design, behavioral — process varies significantly by team
questionPatterns: explain transformer architecture and attention mechanisms
design a large-scale model serving infrastructure
how would you approach fine-tuning vs RAG for a specific use case
what are your thoughts on AI safety and alignment
tell me about a research project or system you built and what you would improve
